response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, but his expertise is heavily skewed toward scripting languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, Python), web technologies, and domain-neutral systems. His C++ experience is limited to early roles (e.g., National Instruments with C/C++) and lacks the 5–10 years of professional C++ development on Windows required for this role. While he demonstrates strong communication and domain exposure in investment practices (RIDE Capital), there is no clear evidence of fixed-income systems or capital-markets expertise.
strengths: Strong background in software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Experience in investment banking domain (RIDE Capital)
Proficiency in multiple languages and frameworks (Dlang, JavaScript, TypeScript)
concerns: No demonstrated 5+ years of professional C++ development on Windows
Lacks domain expertise in Fixed Income or Fixed Income Derivatives
Dominant focus on scripting/web technologies rather than systems programming
